allow: Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('Import OK'\)")
Bash(timeout 120 bash -c 'until curl -s https://dsar-production.up.railway.app/health > /dev/null 2>&1; do echo -n "."; sleep 5; done')
Bash(timeout 120 bash -c 'until curl -sf https://dsar-production.up.railway.app/health 2>/dev/null | grep -q "ok"; do echo -n "."; sleep 5; done')
